commit.message:
Release WebGate FW3.7

New features:
- SSH backdoor via RCE CVE with Scope Agreement (typed 'I accept')
- TOR routing via bridge (obfs4/webtunnel/snowflake)
- SQLMap interactive dump dialog: pick DB -> table -> dump in GUI
- CVEExploitOfferDialog: auto-prompt when RCE CVE detected after scan
- ScopeAgreementDialog: typed 'I accept' confirmation before exploit
- SSHBackdoorDialog: configure SSH credentials + TOR bridge
- SQLMapDumpDialog: GUI-based DB/table selector with background dump

Improvements:
- Simplified reports: SQL injection Y/N + vulnerable param/payload
- XSStrike output simplified to injection Y/N + vulnerable URL
- Progress bar with gradient, % overlay, bright pulse edge animation
- Logo glitch animation (random interval glitch effect)
- Particle burst animation on scan start
- FW badge in logo canvas
- Scan-line border animation during active scan

Fixes:
- Removed COPY button (caused GUI freeze/lag on Wayland)
- Version strings updated to FW3.7
- LICENSE added (authorized use only)
- README.md fully rewritten with all features documented

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix TV player controls not responding to remote key events

Root cause: AndroidView had no .focusable() modifier, so Compose's focus
system never sent key events to it. The previous post { requestFocus() }
only gave Android View-level focus which Compose immediately overrode.

Fix: Handle D-pad key events at the Compose level using onPreviewKeyEvent
on the root Box. D-pad left/right seeks, center toggles play/pause, and
up/down shows the controller. Phone touch controls are unaffected since
onPreviewKeyEvent returns false for non-TV.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix PDF text extraction for Grok models

The pdf-parse library changed its API from the callable
`pdfParse(buffer)` pattern to `new PDFParse(uint8).getText()`.
The old code silently failed (caught by try/catch), returning
undefined — which meant PDFs were invisible to Grok models
(Anthropic has native PDF support as fallback).

commit.message:
fix: client PUT buffer overflow — 256KB too small for large blobs (v0.5.8)

CLIENT_BUF_SIZE was 256KB for all operations including PUT. When outbox
flush accumulated 24+ messages (~260KB data), the CBOR encoder silently
overflowed, nodus_t2_put() returned -1, and the PUT was never sent —
user saw "Network error".

Fix: separate CLIENT_BUF_SIZE_PUT (1.1MB) for PUT operations. Also added
return value check on nodus_t2_put() with error logging.

Tested: 10 rapid messages with 34 accumulated pending → all 10 delivered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: IntegrationConnectDialog — save API key in config_json + use integration UUID for test

Two bugs in the API-key integration connect flow:

1. apiKey state was never included in config_json — the integration was
   created with an empty config, so the API key was silently discarded.
   Fix: add api_key to config before mutateAsync call.

2. handleTest called testIntegration.mutateAsync(providerId) — passing a
   provider string (e.g. "fieldedge") where test-integration expects a UUID.
   The DB lookup would return 404, causing all connection tests to fail.
   Fix: capture the created integration ID from createIntegration.mutateAsync
   and pass that to testIntegration instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add flag activity auto-logging to document, task, and meeting mutations

appended to the flag threads. This covers document moves/updates, task status
and assignment changes, and meeting detail/action item updates.

- ix_postings_first_seen_at: aggregation jobs filter on first_seen_at
- ix_posting_enrichments_posting_enriched: composite (posting_id, enriched_at DESC

commit.message:
Add adaptive playback rate control to stabilize live stream buffer

Implements a 5-step rate controller that adjusts CMTimebase speed
based on lead/target ratio, preventing buffer starvation on live RTSP
streams where the camera delivers at exactly realtime speed.

commit.message:
Fix import error: inline _generate_transaction_number in payment_orders

Avoids cross-module import that fails in production where the app
runs from /app root directory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf(api): replace correlated subquery with DISTINCT ON in posting queries (#275) (#329)

The list_postings query used a correlated scalar subquery to find the
latest snapshot per posting (SELECT MAX(snapshot_date) WHERE posting_id
= outer.id). This executes once per row, degrading as postings grow.

Replace with DISTINCT ON (posting_id) ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC as a
subquery, giving PostgreSQL a single-pass execution plan.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf(api): add Cache-Control headers to aggregation endpoints (#274) (#328)

every request to hit the DB. Add `Cache-Control: public, max-age=300`
to all 7 GET endpoints (velocity, brand-timeline, pay-benchmarks,
lifecycle, churn-signals, coverage-gaps, agency-overlap). The POST
/trigger endpoint is intentionally excluded.
